concepts.name: cloud_ghost_raindrop
concepts.definition: The observation that each raindrop from a cloud carries the horizontal velocity of the cloud and falls at an angle relative to the ground, effectively becoming a 'ghost' of the cloud.
concepts.insight: Every raindrop is a tiny, fleeting echo of the cloud it originates from, carrying its motion in a diagonal trajectory.

concepts.name: rainfall_velocimetry
concepts.definition: The technique of estimating cloud speed by analyzing the geometry and terminal velocity of raindrops.
concepts.insight: By observing raindrop angles and their terminal velocities, one can create a makeshift weather station without technology.

concepts.name: human_raindrop_velocimeter
concepts.definition: The inherent ability of humans to subconsciously estimate cloud speeds based on the angle and pattern of falling raindrops.
concepts.insight: Humans have an undiscovered passive observation network that can detect changes in cloud speed through a natural calibration process.

poetic_versions:
The cloud's ethereal echo,
    In every droplet a fleeting sight,
    Carrying its forward momentum,
    A diagonal dance through the twilight.
    Ghostly whispers from heaven above,
    On earth, they tell of a cloud's love.

In nature's canvas, raindrops paint a tale, 
A geometry unfolds in the air, revealing wind's unseen veil.
With patience and protractor, a poetic sight to behold,
The dance of drops whispers stories yet untold.

A dance of droplets, a silent symphony, 
Unseen and unheard, yet measured by our gaze, 
The human raindrop velocimeter, 
Calibrated in the soul, no hardware required.
mantras: Each raindrop is a ghost of the cloud it left
Raindrop angles reveal the wind's tale

Nature's patterns, human calibration, 
A passive network, a global observation.
